query: ok this is a big one, help me scope it before we touch anything
build the whole internal CRM platform — leads, pipeline, email sync, reporting, the works
should we split this across a few agents or just do it in one pass?
this context is getting huge and we still have like 4 subsystems to go, how do we keep this from going off the rails?
redo the billing system so it handles usage-based plans — not totally sure how we want proration or trials to work yet
i want to add multi-tenant support across the whole app, what do you need from me before you start?
we've got auth, the data model, the dashboard and the API all in flight at once — how should i hand this off so each piece gets clean context?
migrate everything off firebase — auth, db, storage, functions. where do we even begin and who does what?
make it 'social' — feeds, follows, notifications, dms... figure out what that actually means and what to build first
the transcript's getting really long and i don't want quality to tank — should we hand the execution off to fresh workers and just keep you as the orchestrator?
rename this variable from usr to currentUser everywhere in this file
the agents we kicked off three hours ago — are they done yet or stuck?
fan this already-scoped lint sweep out to mac-mini and desktop, you just orchestrate
clicking the save button does nothing now and the console throws a hydration error, find the real cause
is the new revision actually live at the prod URL or are we still serving the old build?
add a loading spinner to the submit button while the request is in flight
review the task list for parallelism and complexity, then plan the waves before we execute
context window's nearly full — run /compact and keep going on the same task
implement the password-reset flow exactly per the spec doc we already wrote — email token, 1h expiry, single-use
did the welcome email actually fire when i signed up the test user, or did it just log success?
